details.test: Task 1: Register account, select starter plan, complete profile
Task 2: Login and join up to 3 technology groups
Task 3: Register for cheapest online event under 50 in next 30 days
Task 4: Send connection requests to up to 3 SF founders with 5+ years experience
Task 5: Switch to cheapest membership plan that includes event discounts
Task 6: Post collaboration request with budget and timeline in a group
Task 7: Find mentor-like member and bookmark in Mentors list
Task 8: Send follow-up message to connection attending same event
Task 9: Update notification preferences (disable email, keep in-app for messages/events)
